allow: PowerShell(if \(-not \(Get-Module -ListAvailable PSScriptAnalyzer\)\) { Install-Module PSScriptAnalyzer -Scope CurrentUser -Force -AcceptLicense -ErrorAction Stop } ; \(Get-Module -ListAvailable PSScriptAnalyzer | Select-Object -First 1\).Version)
PowerShell(pwsh -NoProfile -File .\\run.ps1 l 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5; ""; "--- Report Header ---"; Get-Content reports\\pssa\\pssa-report.md -TotalCount 8)
PowerShell(pwsh -NoProfile -File .\\run.ps1 l 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5; "--- PSSA ---"; Get-Content reports\\pssa\\pssa-report.md -TotalCount 8)

PowerShell(Install-Module Pester -Scope CurrentUser -Force -SkipPublisherCheck -AllowClobber -MinimumVersion 5.0 -ErrorAction Stop; \(Get-Module -ListAvailable Pester | Sort-Object Version -Descending | Select-Object -First 1\).Version)

PowerShell(pwsh -NoProfile -File .\\run.ps1 p 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5; ""; pwsh -NoProfile -File .\\run.ps1 l 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5; ""; Get-Content reports\\pssa\\pssa-report.md -TotalCount 8)

PowerShell(& powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Install-Module Pester -Scope CurrentUser -Force -SkipPublisherCheck -MinimumVersion 5.0 -ErrorAction Stop; Import-Module Pester -MinimumVersion 5.0; Invoke-Pester -Path .\\tests\\ -Output Minimal" 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 15)

PowerShell(pwsh -NoProfile -File .\\run.ps1 p 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 3; ""; pwsh -NoProfile -File .\\run.ps1 l 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 3; ""; Get-Content reports\\pssa\\pssa-report.md -TotalCount 7)
PowerShell("=== PS 7 ==="; pwsh -NoProfile -File .\\run.ps1 t 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 6; ""; "=== PS 5.1 ==="; & powershell.exe -NoProfile -File .\\run.ps1 t 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 6)

PowerShell("=== PS7 via bundle ==="; pwsh -NoProfile -Command "Import-Module '$\(\(Resolve-Path .\\_deps\\Pester\\5.7.1\\Pester.psd1\).Path\)' -Force; Invoke-Pester -Path .\\tests\\ -Output Minimal" 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 4; ""; "=== PS5.1 via bundle ==="; & powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Import-Module '$\(\(Resolve-Path .\\_deps\\Pester\\5.7.1\\Pester.psd1\).Path\)' -Force; Invoke-Pester -Path .\\tests\\ -Output Minimal" 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 4)
